forecast_7day.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 85. Northwest wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

Patchy fog before 7am, then a slight chance of rain showers between 10am and 11am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 1pm and 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 82. North northwest wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

A slight chance of rain showers between 8am and 11am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 82. West wind 1 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.
A slight chance of rain showers between 8am and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 76. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

active_alerts.headline: Heat Advisory issued June 12 at 10:19AM EDT until June 12 at 8:00PM EDT by NWS Greenville-Spartanburg SC
active_alerts.description:
* WHAT...Heat index values up to 105 expected.

* WHERE...Cabarrus, Mecklenburg, and Union Counties in North
Carolina.

* WHEN...Until 8 PM EDT this evening.

* IMPACTS...Hot temperatures and high humidity may cause heat
illnesses.
active_alerts.instruction:
Drink plenty of fluids, stay in an air-conditioned room, stay out of
the sun, and check up on relatives and neighbors.

Do not leave young children and pets in unattended vehicles. Car
interiors will reach lethal temperatures in a matter of minutes.

notes: Wind speed 29.0 mph exceeds safe limits

general_safety: 🌡️ Heat Advisory: Ensure hydration stations, frequent breaks
💨 High Wind: Secure loose materials, caution with tall equipment
